## What this changes

(one or two sentences)

## Type

- [ ] New persona / copy examples
- [ ] New or improved banner style
- [ ] Cringe-detector additions
- [ ] LinkedIn selector fix
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] No real personal data anywhere in the diff (no real names, employers, emails, handles, numbers)
- [ ] No committed secrets (keys, tokens, cookies, snapshots)
- [ ] Helper scripts run with `--help` and `--demo` (if I touched them)
- [ ] New user-facing text follows the plain-English style in `references/question-format.md`
- [ ] If I touched `linkedin-selectors.md`, I noted the date I verified against live LinkedIn
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"

## Notes for the reviewer

(anything that needs context)
